title: Networks Vertical Hero
scene_prompt: Cinematic twilight photograph of converging telecommunications infrastructure: satellite ground station dishes and terrestrial cell towers sharing the same facility compound. Multiple satellite antennas of varying sizes pointing at different orbital positions alongside modern 5G tower arrays. Warm golden hour lighting from the left mixing with cool blue twilight sky. Data visualization overlays showing connectivity paths from ground to orbit rendered as subtle luminous trails. Professional industrial photography aesthetic with shallow depth of field on the nearest dish. Hyper-realistic, no text, no people.
palette: Deep twilight blue sky; warm golden infrastructure lighting; Cyber Emerald #00D1B2 data trails; Rich Charcoal #1A1A1A shadows

title: Multi-Vendor NMS Fragmentation
scene_prompt: Minimal 3D abstract icon: 5-7 separate monitoring screen shapes arranged in a chaotic cluster, each displaying different vendor-specific data formats. No unified connection between them. An overwhelmed operator position in the center trying to watch all screens simultaneously. Fragmentation and tool sprawl aesthetic. Clean isometric perspective on transparent dark background. Simple, iconic, immediately readable.
palette: Rich Charcoal #1A1A1A background; each screen a different color temperature; Safety Amber #F4A261 operator stress indicator

title: Fault Correlation Across Domains
scene_prompt: Minimal 3D abstract icon: four domain layers stacked vertically — terrestrial tower, backhaul link, satellite gateway, orbital satellite — each with its own isolated alert indicator. Red fault markers on multiple layers but no correlation lines connecting them. The question mark of which domain caused the failure. Clean isometric on dark background.
palette: Rich Charcoal #1A1A1A background; Red #DC2626 fault markers; Cyber Emerald #00D1B2 domain layers; Safety Amber #F4A261 question mark

title: Multi-Orbit Complexity
scene_prompt: Minimal 3D abstract icon: concentric orbital rings at different altitudes and inclinations — GEO (high, stable), MEO (mid), LEO (low, dense with many small satellites). The rings overlap and intersect creating visual complexity. Static monitoring dashboard shape below that cannot keep up with the dynamic orbital mechanics above. Clean isometric on dark background.
palette: Intelligence Navy #0A1128 background; Different Cyber Emerald shades per orbit; Safety Amber #F4A261 complexity intersections; Red #DC2626 overwhelmed dashboard

scene_prompt: Minimal 3D abstract icon: a revenue container split into terrestrial and satellite halves. Undetected leakage at the domain boundary aesthetic. Clean isometric on dark background.

scene_prompt: Minimal 3D abstract icon: two infrastructure stacks — terrestrial toolchain on the left, satellite toolchain on the right — with a 3GPP NTN standard bridge spanning between them at the top (UE/radio layer) but a wide empty gap below at the operations layer.
